name: io.github.manziosee/kobo-mcp-server
description: MCP server exposing KoboToolbox survey data (forms, submissions, media, geodata, QA checks) to AI agents

environmentVariables.name: KOBO_API_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: KoboToolbox API token (Account Settings -> Security -> API Token)

environmentVariables.name: KOBO_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Base URL of your Kobo server API, e.g. https://kf.kobotoolbox.org (default) or https://eu.kobotoolbox.org
